understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to win all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces onto all goal tiles (+) simultaneously in each level, using efficient actions within the step budget until the engine reports WIN for the entire run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece (P), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if unblocked; walls (#) block movement variably and must be tested; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates like [x,y]; all goals must be occupied at once to win a level, with positions in 3-pixel-per-cell grid coordinates.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to win all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces onto all goal tiles (+) simultaneously in each level, using efficient actions within the step budget until the engine reports WIN for the entire run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece (P), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if unblocked; walls (#) block movement variably and must be tested; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates like [x,y]; all goals must be occupied at once to win a level, with positions in 3-pixel-per-cell grid coordinates.
